name: The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners - Chapter 2: Retribution

reviews.review_description:
The game is nice because of story, action and more stuff like more crafting benches, home is extended and more secret crafting recepies but I’m not gonna glaze the game and ignore the bad stuff about this game so here are the bad stuff

The graphics/image quality is downgraded from the last one, the original game had better graphics, but in this game, other survivors faces sometimes look glitched and look wrong, can’t even recognize the game

Sometimes when trying to decapitate the head, the cleaver slides off like the zombie flesh was made out of titanium

Lastly, the voices sound different and sometimes sound like 7/8 year olds, basically little children


On the good side, here are what they added that is great

Traveling at night, you can now loot houses or buildings in the dark meanwhile having that one feeling that you are being watched

Having fighting gloves, notice that you had to use melees or guns to kill a zombie?, now you can pack a punch with the gloves, they are not very durable tho, except the secret one

Lastly, 3 new maps,


That’s all, hope the review helped

Don’t listen to the 4-1 stars this game is sooooo peak it never get boring and story is fantastic and I really hope that this turns into a movie that would be soooo sick, and a lot of people say that it’s buggy but it really not at all sure there like a bug here and there but every game has bugs in it. PLEASE MAKE A 3ND ONE AND TEXT ME FOR STORY IDEAS 😉

reviews.review_title: Great game but has bugs still
reviews.review_description:
Amazing game, Played this after completing the Orgininal Saints and sinners I love the new weapons and how you rebel against the tower and how the fate of NOLA is your decision, But I do have some bugs that have ethier caused me to softlock or are just visibly irritating to see so here's the list: 

The dailouge during the mission with farther carter has a one that caused a softlock, When you return the crucifix and refuse to do what he tells you he Gets up but it keeps looping as if I walked away then it repeats over and over again making it an endless loop of him getting up then standing still than doing it all over agains

There is a flare stuck floating in the bus, Can't even interact with it it's just stuck there floating.

Another which isn't a bug but more of a suggestion, When crafting the Esteemed mortal having it Vertical isn't the best idea since it Catches on the Crafting board and end up flying so if crafting weapons like this can you have it they craft horizontal instead to prevent me wasting my supplies on an Axe that's send itself into space lol

Ima get straight to the point with no story why I got the game but when got the game and launched it the graphics are so cheeks Ive asked other people and researched but no answer the NPC graphics are so bad and it’s buggy if you want to see my game play dm me

I love this game so much it’s so good I like to pretend I’m negan also the other bad reviews of this complain about bugs and glitches I’ve played this game a lot and in my experience never had a glitch or bug it’s a really good game I played this game before the first one and I prefer this game

I have never played the Story but the cheat codes are peak, some will give you LOTS of ammunition and LOTS of supplies, if you want these codes go on YouTube or TikTok and search up Codes for the walking dead chapter two VR, it should pop up, Believe me this Game is better than other zombie shooters/survival games, even better to the first one, THIS IS A MUST HAVE IF YOU WANT A FUN ZOMBIE THRILLING SHOOTER.(btw this game includes Awesome hand wepons from knifes to a zombie mowing chainsaw

The lower ratings on this game are people expecting perfect graphics from a 10 dollar game.  Played through the entire first game multiple times and then bought this just yesterday because i love these games so much. Here and there it has a flaw but its all around amazing and worth the 10 bucks would recommend.

reviews.review_title: It wasn't as bad as what people told me
reviews.review_description: The game has some weird quirks and bugs here and there (character LOD issues, assets appearing out of no where, and crashes but that doesn't happen too often and other games have had that as well), but overall it is a great experience. The story has plot holes and isn't as well written as the first game, but it makes up for it with action. The campaign puts you in many intense combat situations and has you explore areas that are fascinating and introduce even more combat opportunities. The new weapons and locations are very good but the Tower location doesn't have as much loot as I would expect. There are new activities like exploring all the maps in nighttime, doing trading with the survivors, and finding backpacks with loot that belong to survivors who died. It's 10 dollars, so it is already cheaper than many other games that are 20 dollars or more. I suggest buying it, especially if it's on sale as it can get ridiculously cheap for what it offers.

This game is really good, but for $60 it would be nice if the story was a little longer and had more missions, I also wish that the dead bodies and heads would stay where you put them and they dont disappear so I can put zombie head on my self in the bus but other then that its a really good game

Melee weapons no longer work for **** because they’re all suddenly made of rubber. Doesn’t matter how fast you swing your katana, just bounces off like it’s made of foam. Wtf is that about?? No wonder the game is hard when you can’t hit a thing because all of your weapons are suddenly junk.

Weeks later, still the same. Walkers clip through you and all of the sudden your weapons are rubber or don’t even show up as your swinging or your garbage bounding boxes mean you magically grab your backpack instead of a weapon while being swarmed. 

Trash. Avoid this game.

Several weeks after that, controls are now bugged and head alignment no longer aligns to the body and is either offset or twisted. Resetting the view does nothing. This game is ripping people off. Reported.

I have wrote a few reviews about this game but many of the previous bugs are fixed. Game does not lag out as much as it used to. However, there are still some issues, mid mission the gun your using melts into the floor becoming completely unusable, weapons fling out your hand and often off ledges as there is a lot of climbing in this game, right and left weapon slots become randomly empty and all on character storage is a bit buggy which is probably more about input lag because when you reach of the backpack and grab your flashlight or try to put your third weapon away and it falls over and over. 
Over all this game is peak. Absolutely loved the first one and the story of this one is even better. Much more difficult and so many more things happening at once. Never a dull or boring moment and so so so many things to do. So many locations to discover. And being able to transfer save data from one to two makes it so much more enjoyable and rewarding. Absolutely would recommend to anyone and everyone. Motion sickness is definitely a thing but the game handles very well. Very smooth movements.

reviews.review_title: Great game but just one thing
reviews.review_description: The story is not as good as the first game but after beating it the game becomes way funner I accidentally chose the bad ending but now I have a mission, save all locations from overrunning. This makes the game so much funner with stacked ammo and enough guns to kill hordes of zombies

reviews.review_title: It's better than Assassin's Creed Nexus
reviews.review_description: It's better than Assassin's Creed Nexus VR around or about exactly the exact same price. It has a good story. It worked out well well Assassin's Creed Nexus well sucked

This game started out as buggy, chaotic and terribly paced, as for the rest of the game there were many immersion breaks, bugs, and etc. The game was kinda fun, but if you are a person who likes to be immersed, and not SPOONFED loot, or having the whole game be a glitchy fetch quest game, then please reconsider.
Before i got this game i was 6'4, a healthy weight and really muscular. Now after playing, I'm 4'2, 390 Pounds and ugly. In all serious, best game on vr

This game looks bad when you watch videos about it or read certain reviews but for me I didn’t pay attention to those I bought the game tried it and found out it isn’t one one billionth as bad as people say it is is the story weird yes does it crash allot for me no but in general yes but in my opinion this game is a almost perfect sequel to the first and a great example of don’t judge a book by word of mouth judge it by reading it and forging your own conclusions and opinions on it

reviews.review_title: For the love of god please fix this
reviews.review_description: In one quest where sonny wants the worn photo i had given him 2 other mission items instead just to see what happens, i gave him the walkie talkie and something else i cant remember then a few quests further on The Pawn mission after whistles mission i was supposed to wait for sonny to contact me on channel 65 i Waited and waited and waited, it is completely stuck.

If you haven't played the first part of this game, it will be hard for you, you won't understand the story. Look at it like you missed out on why John Wick became what he is, if you started with the second part or one of the following, you won't have the whole story. It's the same with this game. Start with the first part, finish it. Transfer all your stuff to this second part, if you don't know how, there is a youtube clip about transferring items using a unique code that the game creates for you, do it and you will be satisfied.

Please make a chapter 3 it would be so fun, not to hate on the youtubers that say this game is bad this game is awesome the only bugs i saw was echo on the table and it was a bit laggy at so he points but nothing that made the game bad
Good game even 3-5 years later went The Walking Dead ￼chapter 3 ￼ down to my last ￼ shot  (here a name for it the walking dead down to my last shot￼￼
I was A little hesitant to get the first one but regretted it so when this dropped immediately got it and extremely happy I did great game tons of fun
This is a good game but they should add a multiplayer
Really good story good combat

reviews.review_title: It's a cheaper version of the real game
reviews.review_description: I thought it was the real game but it was not it was just is the game but it's just split in half you don't get the old man hanging in the beginning you don't get cut sceneswhat you see from videos and I didn't know it was the cheaper version of the real game it's a scam people  I'm sad I just want to refund I didn't know it was just a cheaper version but breakfast are great a lot of bugs a lot of glitches and I'll just want my money back and I'm set up and I'm sad and I'm crying I didn't know it was the fake version I thought it was the real version from videos but I'll give it two stars

Yes, its a bit buggy, but its quite fun, not nearly as bad as the reviews make it out to be, also, some of the reviews are just wrong, like the one saying that frying pans no longer work as weapons, they still do, unfortunately due to the reviews we may not get a chapter 3, which is unfortunate because its really fun, if we do get it though i do hope they take more time to refine it,

For my criticism:
None of the bugs ive encountered are game breaking, usually just texture glitches, but bugs are bugs,

The pace of the story doesn't feel as clean as the first,

Sometimes items will bug out and you have to drop and pick them back up (happened twice in my time playing, which is over the course of 2 week)

Chapter 1 has little to no story input on chapter 2,

The good:
More content

The story isn't just fetch quests like the first game, which feels quite refreshing

Night, you have twice the loot runs you can make in a day, and often better loot at night,

2 more workbenches to upgrade, which means more weapons and items to help

Home expansion! If you like base decorations/management, it'll probably make you as happy as it made me,

More collectables, if you like to 100% games, you will probably like collecting the nighttime demon statues and statues for the new locations,

Change of pants and replacement underwear: its still spooky, maybe even more so, and its both harder and easier.

What i felt was missing:
Challenge/trial mode, it looks like it was supposed to exist, but just doesn't

 .45 handgun, there's (technically 3) revolvers and still only 1 mag fed semi auto handgun (yes there's smgs, but those are smgs, not pistols), i was hoping to get a 1911 style handgun,

Again, part of the story, the last of the story missions were really fun, but also felt really lacking, like it was either a last minute thought, or the story changed but they kept the ending because it "sorta fits"

Pawn king: strictly a story thing, wouldve been great if you could actually trade with him or buy stuff,

Variety, most items have 2 versions, the "bad" version, low level workbench stuff, and the "good" version, which usually just came up as a blueprint and not from upgrades, which is fine, but there's no in between for those 2 ends, just a personal issue because i like having more weapon options,

Extra input on "Variety" the game adds a new melee that doesn't take up inventory space, the gloves, "switch from guns to melee seamlessly" i feel like that shouldve been expanded on, bayonets For long arms like the bolt action, giving you more time to rechamber a round,
There's also what ill call "upgrades", weapon attatchments, only added tac lasers and super rare supressors, they couldve expanded on that too, with tac lights, uses red dot slot on guns, dimmer, but don't flicker and go out, 2x scopes, strictly for the bolt action rifles, bottle supressors, worse and quickly break, exploding how broken arrows do, but are craftable, maybe blueprint needs to be found, etc etc,



The game is great, absolutely phenomenal, but it can be improved, praying for chapter 3, probably gonna be called something like "Redemption" with jb back, i hope aleast

Yes, the graphics are worse than the first game, it's because they had to fit everything from the first game (physics, weapons, maps, ai behavior) AND the new bigger maps and weapons and enemies into the same gpu and ram from the  quest headsets. Enough lore and exploration that it took me 24 hours to beat the main story, and I still played for several hours after that. The story is pretty good. The factions are more explored and developed but I do feel like your fighting someone else's battle. In the first game, you're fighting for the reserve anything you would need, in this one almost all the main missions are to help someone else takedown the tower. Also I wish that when you were transferring save files from the old game it would save your choices, like killing Mama's daughter over the reclaim leader would impact the story of the second one instead of saying "they both mysteriously dissappeared" And whether you killed May or not would affect your interactions with the Axeman. Also how did Geralt survive the walk? It is a plummet from the top of the tower. Plothole? Anyway very good game and love the additions to the bus and the new attachments,

Is really well made, the details are really good, and I love the way the gore works. I rate it 4 stars because it’s pretty scary, but that’s just me, and I’m sure it’s intended to be scary, with the ambience and darkness, and hordes. Recommend to buy, don’t listen to the bad reviews, it’s not just a part 2 to the first game, it’s sorta its own game, but it is also super story oriented. I recommend spending the money, it’s basically a cheaper version of the first game, and has some nice weapons!
I would say i don't like this game but knowing zombie fans ITS GREAT FOR THEM

So I have owned this game for about a year now, and I love it they just added a lot more of the everything we liked from the first game more areas new zombies, extra gear, good graphics, they even gave us a boss fight and you have to use the crafting system to defend yourself! But on that note this where i start to whine and complain. the game is a buggy mess especially in the npcs textures and pathfinders like a npc was walking at me while i got stuck in crouch i threw a grenade and even though i was 10ft in front of it the npc turned around to go investigate the sound your boat when its lit on fire it lagged my games and framerate so bad i was scared i was going to crash or my personal fav there is just a a floating ghost flare in my bus no joke cant interact with it it just exists

reviews.review_title: great game needs a lot of polishing
reviews.review_description: i'm a huge fan of this series right don't get me wrong i love it it's the first game is a amazing game i would recommend it but this game it's just so buggy the graphics are an insane drop off but i can look past those what i have a issue with is the bugs that actually make it impossible to beat the game cuz whenever i try to do the required exile trade i just can't do it the boxes won't spawn
i am stucked on mission “ go to Rampart at night” , i go and there is no woman that i am looking for..

on a stand alone meda quest two this game is unplayable originally i could play it without a single leg but after the first mission i can't do a single thing without the entire game lagging i uninstalled and restarted and it's still doing the exact same thing the game is unplayable and as much as i love the first one i can't even enjoy the second it is so annoying that i spent money on this game and now i can't even play it
I love this game and already wish there was a chapter 3. I am late to the party and just beat Gerik - have Tower and Exile trades left. Would love to see some current player discussions!

reviews.review_title: Why are some of there faces werid
reviews.review_description: Some of the humans have unfinished faces and they look weird and ugly over all it still is a good game.

From a game desinger who knows what  it takes to make a game this series is great the minor flaws are nothing to the immesi e experience they actually dummied the game down so most will have a chance to to play the should have hid the real ending, for us explorers. I UNDERSTAND THE COMPLAINTS, I  AM OLDER been playing games since I beat donkey Kong at age 5, but this got me up I might have to jump back into unity and try my hand at Vr, I know what your looking for and if games like this can get a bad review then any game can all bad reviews people just remember this game could have been harder but it's made easy. TO the developers make a chapter 3 and show us what the walking dead universe is all about trust me the fans will love a harder play through that is decision based. Earn those negative reviews I played though three times trying to see if o could change the games ending it just feels like there more to it maybe not, but I had gave up on developing games this inspired me to get back into the craft, after I get my masters in game development Ai can only do so much you need the human element to for a deeper immersive experience MAKE A CHAPTER 3 WE WANT WE NEED IT.

reviews.review_title: The npc face model looks super bad
reviews.review_description: Excellent game 10/10 great sequel and great first game to
Yes
The game is literally peak

I bought the payback dlc and it was fine at first but a couple hours later I don't have the blueprints  for Fat Tuesday and The Blessing (GOLDEN 9MM)  and I don't have the Saints & Sinners tables. But the game is still fun

this game was pretty good i liked it and it wasn't too expensive which makes it a good game for anybody looking for a decent experience. however this game did have a few bugs like my weapons despawing out of my hand and disappearing and it's a bit laggy when looking at fire. other than that it's an amazing game amazing experience and i highly recommend this. overall i would give this game an eight out of 10.

Game was okay for apart from a few visual issues, alot of the game felt like it was made too quickly, I couldn't follow the story as easy as the first but it still was a good game, nice new places and skins for new guns and tools.

reviews.review_title: Not as good as the 1st game
reviews.review_description: this feels like a knock off it has worse lighting and textures but the gun and melee handling is the same

This game contains huge bugs, many glitches, and horrible mission mechanics. You know, this game does feel rushed, there is a couple zombie and people models that look terrible in graphics, and it made my stomach turn a bit on looks. I played the first game and had a fun time, but this game had so many glitches, I have a flare stuck in mid air at my base that I can’t remove, unless I restart (I think). I had a low battery during a mission, and I had important stuff I couldn’t lose, so I went back to my boat to leave, and it didn’t warn me that I would lose progress, so I left and my progress that took a half hour, all gone. And don’t let me forget on how the map literally disappears throughout the game, it’s so glitched. And the zombie count broke, because as I was heading throughout the map I kept turning around to 5 zombies, and even when I killed them they spawn right in front of my face in a huge number. Honestly I expected something better than this. I do not recommend this to players who love scenery, and not buggy games.

This game has been one of the best games I played on. This is not me glazing it or whatever, but realistically, you feel like you're in the game and you can actually slay with the zombies I want apart, 3I know, since I realized that they might make a part 3, but I don't know if they will, if they don't, because they had the number, they didn't say it on number one, but they said on number 2, they'll be apart 2 sound like. Okay, maybe they'll make a part 3, so game developers, whatever  Please make a part 3 thankyou
Its fun but its boring and it looks cartoonish and i think it would be better if it was more realistic but overall great game

This game may have simple graphics, but it has some of the best atmosphere in any vr game I've played. And the storytelling is perfect. The sheer force of dread I feel walking into a dark room at night needs to be studied. My only complaint is the walker spawn patterns. I don't remember if this issue was present in the 1st game, but walkers do tend to spawn near or on top of you pretty frequently. Fantastic game, my fear of the dark has returned. 8/10
During the first mission a NPC'S face was all blocky, and I could see holes into the void. Do not buy unless you only want the story

Number one the chainsaw when you try to cut a zombie it leaves like a black thing inside where you cut the zombie open it's really weird I found a flying zombie once which should not be possible but this game is fun overall a lot of bugs lot of weird things please saints and sinners please fix your game this is not how the game should be it's a good beautiful masterpiece great quality honestly really good game but really buggy honestly you guys need to fix this.

Great game words can’t explain the type of fun you have punching heads off, blowing holes in zombies definitely a top game.

ONLY ISSUES
Too scary at times to play solo especially at night irl, wish they had pets or multiplayer this would actually be game changing me and my mates would bash this out for weeks pls add multiplayer I beg you. Another issue it’s very easy to sh1t yourself so watch out for creaking doors
The main game is good and the gore but pls add Multiplayer

reviews.review_title: Read please both ch1 and ch2
reviews.review_description: The first game has a long story  the second game continue ￼ on the story ￼￼ how the Taurus hasn’t picked any side believe in any side ￼

It says “what happened?” And simply won’t progress no matter what I do. You know the mission where you get the two sawn off shotguns and the generator gets stolen, it simply gets bugged and won’t allow me to progress, the mission doesn’t update and I get stuck
Help

One of the better games i've gotten for my VR. Besides the bugs this game has been really fun and scary at times. The UI can use some polishing when grabbing, storing and disposing items. Especially when climbing the UI feels like it struggles, maybe adding the ability to jump would help. Besides that I have had problems with the lever action not working in the past. But overall this game has been really fun playing it would be cool to have more tower related missions and more weapon customization .

reviews.review_title: Good, but not as good a chapter 2
reviews.review_description: I recently wrote a review on chapter 1 talking about how good it was, chapter 2 is excellent but a few small things caught my eyes. Firstly, the graphics are not as good and I think the mouth moving to words from the NPC’s was lazy, but other than that it is awesome! I love the chainsaw(and how gruesome it is) and the gloves are really nice, who knew it would be so fun to give zombies the good old 1-2 to take them down! 😂 Edit: I’m rating this game 5 now becuase I just completed the axman fight! It was one of the most engaging bosses I’ve ever fought. Also, if you are making a chapter 3, I think some sort of companion like a German shepherd or pitbull would be very fun!

Game is extremely immersive stabbing feels amazing with nice dismemberment. The ai is pretty bad but dosent ruin the experiment. Story is the best in the first one but is still good here. You live in a bus at a graveyard upgrading for tools and herbs.

Good game but it has its bugs. Zombies randomly spawn in areas when you look the other way, kinda annoying. Story is weird and stretched out. I like the boss fight with Gerrick and getting there is awesome. Debating on a 3 or 4 stars..
I love the game but it gets a bit boring I wish their was multiplayer
It would be fcking good if it would stop redoing the tut
If you want a game that can scare you this is it. But it looks like a old movie

Ive had this game since release when I finished the absolute masterpiece the first game was. Every time I enter the game the loading screen stays up forever. No matter how many times I delete and install again the game doesn't work. I've also tried to back up my data from the first game but still no fix. This is ridiculous and dissapointing.
Number1. Multiplayer zombie game will attract people otherwise good game though
On the medical quest free the best one you can get it with the worst  graphics I've ever saw in a VR game

It keeps crashing when i equip the Louisiana kiss
but other then that its a great game

I was playing and there was a mission where you have to find apartment 212 and there was a appear with a code I forgot what the code was and the game didn’t let me take the paper and once you grab the paper it disappears so I had to restart the whole entire game and played for 2 hours this game is so stupid

I’ve never played a game with so many bugs. Hard to believe this actually got released… Couldn’t complete a single mission without needing to restart/reset due to so multiple bugs that leave you stuck and missions unable to be completed. Even things as simple as NPC communication gets bugged out (some of which you NEED to go through to proceed in the story). On top of never giving a mission objective until you’ve left your resting place leaving you unprepared for every single mission. This needs to be deleted and all consumers refunded

￼
Just finished the first one now I'm halfway through this one. I read all of the negative views and some of the positive I wanted to give it a try. It's great. If you love the first game you'll love this one also. I gave the first one a 5star, I'm giving this a 4 because there are still lots of bugs and texture issues , but the game itself is great.

from playing the first game and having the best experience in a vr zombies game i had high hopes when i saw that they actually made a 2nd game! i wouldnt say its better than the first but its definitely still fun and i LOVE the new recipes and weapons. overall the game has been fun and although buggy at times its a good addition to the first game and im addicted to getting a 3rd! although my only complaint really is to PLEASE fix the orphan bow recipe not spawning, its bothering me that my 1st saved slot has a missing recipe.

This is my favorite game its cool twd is also my favorite series so heck ya it's has an awesome
 story it's cheap and it has new weapon and stuff it's has awesome maps there should be a  coop plz creators make coop that would be the best thing about the game

reviews.review_title: Just as good or even better than TWD 1.
reviews.review_description: Not sure why there are bunch of little weasels hating for no reason. It’s a very good game with a decent story.

reviews.review_title: The best vr game I have ever played
reviews.review_description: Saints and sinners chapter two has to be one of my favorite and the best vr game I have ever played in my life. It is a a very good continuation of the first game with new story, weapons, and more to explore. Sure the game has its fair share of bugs but if you look past the bugs it really isn’t as unplayable as people say this game is. The game in my opinion is very VERY hated on for no reason at all. It is a lot better than most of the games on the vr store that you’ll ever find and unsurprisingly I am really REALLY sad there is not a third one. Please BEG for a new saints and sinners this 2026.

Buggy sable won’t call me unless im out and the reserve is only accessible through the resting place other then that the game is fun idk i just wanna play my game man and that was a saved file from the first  game i don’t wanna start all the way over and have to make a new one😭😭

When the update hit and fixed everything it gave me new hands, I know I’m being a little dumb but can you add a feature so you can change hand styles in game after you confirm. Thank you for your time

And I know that my review last time I said it was a good game but it is a good game the thing is there's too many glitches I started the game over after I finished it now that I have the game has too many glitches I like to write this review and let people know it's a good game but there's too many glitches I don't know why it does that but it's not fun like that

It's really good and similar to the original, but it is NOT optimized for q3 and the first one looks 20x better on my broken q2, its hard to transition from the first game to this one and keep in mind that it's a sequal. This game looks like garbage and I actually laughed out loud at the opening scene. But I love these devs with all my heart, and their first twd game played a core part of my childhood watching youtubers play it waiting for it to be my turn, and like I said, wonky physics and eyelidless people and zombies aside, it is definitely worth the buy if you don't mind choppy graphics, love ya skydance!
please

reviews.review_title: A lot of glitches but good game
reviews.review_description: Played this game and it a good story but it has a lot of glitches when I talk to the characters because it keeps on repeating what the characters are saying.
